title: First brain compaction: archive TASK-147-192 era narrative
description: notes/brain-compaction-guide.md trigger is ~45 tasks overdue (no compaction has ever run; archive/compactions/ does not exist). Compact completed-work narrative from shared active memory into archive/compactions/compaction-2026-07-14-tasks-147-192.md per the guide and templates/compaction-summary.md: preserve decisions/risks/outcomes, remove stale progress narrative from current-state.md and improvement-backlog.md, keep raw history untouched in events/artifacts, backlink from active files. Follows the guide's safety rules: no raw-log deletion, no history rewriting, no closing unresolved questions without evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Compaction summary follows templates/compaction-summary.md with scope, sources, tasks covered, durable outcomes, decisions preserved, open follow-ups, archive links, active files updated.
current-state.md sheds superseded/stale narrative while keeping current capabilities, risks, and next maintenance; validate_shared_state passes 21/21 after edits.
No raw history deleted anywhere; active files backlink to the compaction summary.
Closed improvement-backlog items moved to the compaction summary, open ones retained.
